who: HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto for employee benefits management
offer: For HR managers in small to medium-sized companies using Gusto processing 5–15 employee benefits updates/month, manual tracking causes delays in communication. We automate the process instead of manual spreadsheets and email notifications.
problem: Manual tracking of employee benefits updates
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Participate in community forums for HR tools
try_it: Let users try centralized dashboard for tracking benefits on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
